title: Regression test uses independent oracle (Space/get after failed set)
description: test_space_set_mixed_patch_invalid_role_leaves_name_unchanged verifies atomicity with an independent oracle: after the failed Space/set, it issues a Space/get and checks the name is still "Original Name". This is the correct pattern — it does not trust the notUpdated response alone, it goes back to the store and confirms the state. A contributor might suggest removing the Space/get check as redundant; it is not — it is the actual atomicity proof.
